text: Machine learning is a way for computers to learn from data. In one common type, called supervised learning, the computer is given training data. This data includes examples that already have the correct answers. Using this, the computer builds a model, which is a rule or set of rules for making decisions. Once the model is ready, it can make predictions on new data it has never seen before. To see how well the model works, we check its accuracy. This tells us how often the model's predictions are correct. A more accurate model is better at performing the task.
